comment: Ordered inputs per volume; paths are relative to repo root. Edit to add/remove chapters. The build script rewrites inline links to other .md files: targets in this list stay as plain text; targets outside the list become 'label (full document not included in this PDF edition)'. HTTP(S) links are unchanged. Optional roadmap_excerpt_lines replaces docs/ROADMAP.md with an abridged generated file in the preprocess dir.

volumes.title: Chump — Showcase, market, and academic review
volumes.subtitle: Executive framing, first-run golden path, ecosystem vision, market critique, roadmap snapshot, reader appendix

volumes.title: Chump — Technical dossier and architecture
volumes.subtitle: Design, API summary, ops, validation ladder, collaboration protocol, trust, technical supplement

volumes.subtitle: Fleet roles, Mabel dossier, research excerpt, defense pilot, federal pipeline
